title: Surgeon Vacancy at RML Hospital - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Surgeon Vacancy at RML Hospital - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at RML Hospital. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Surgeon to strengthen our Jodhpur-based team.

About RML Hospital:
RML Hospital is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor patient progress and adjust treatment plans accordingly
• Coordinate with multidisciplinary teams for comprehensive patient management
• Ensure patient privacy and maintain confidentiality
• Maintain accurate clinical documentation in electronic health records
• Collaborate with pharmaceutical representatives and medical suppliers
• Participate in quality improvement initiatives and clinical audits
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Clinical Documentation
• Proficiency in BLS/ACLS
• Proficiency in Medical Terminology
• Proficiency in NABH Standards
• Proficiency in Diagnostic Skills
• Proficiency in EMR/EHR
• Proficiency in Pharmacovigilance
• Proficiency in CPT Codes

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Life and accident insurance
• Referral bonus program
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Jodhpur, Rajasthan, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with RML Hospital!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
